member.name: M:Prime.ConsoleService.ConsoleSessionContextProvider.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:Prime.ConsoleService.PrimeConsoleLogLevel
member.summary: The log level to print to messages to the console.

member.name: F:Prime.ConsoleService.PrimeConsoleLogLevel.Disabled
member.summary: No debug messages will be printed.

member.name: F:Prime.ConsoleService.PrimeConsoleLogLevel.Enabled
member.summary: Only Test Method debug messages will be printed.

summary.para: ConsoleService - Prints data to the console.

member.name: M:Prime.ConsoleService.IConsoleService.PrintEmphasize(System.String)
member.summary: Prints input message always in emphasized color (red).

member.name: M:Prime.ConsoleService.IConsoleService.PrintDebug(System.Func{System.String},Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: The construction and printing of the message will occur only when debug mode is enabled.
member.param: Function returning the message to print.

member.name: M:Prime.ConsoleService.IConsoleService.PrintError(System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer,System.Int32,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Prints error message to the console.
member.param: The caller line number, keep empty will auto-populate by the compiler.
The caller function, keep empty will auto-populate by the compiler.
The caller file, Keep empty will auto-populate by the compiler.

member.name: M:Prime.ConsoleService.IConsoleService.PrintError(System.String,System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Prints error message with stack trace to the console.
member.param: The stack trace coming from the exception.

member.name: M:Prime.ConsoleService.IConsoleService.PrintError(System.Exception,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer,System.Int32,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Prints error message with stack trace to the console.
member.param: The caller line number, keep empty will auto-populate by the compiler.
The caller function, keep empty will auto-populate by the compiler.
The caller file, Keep empty will auto-populate by the compiler.

member.name: M:Prime.ConsoleService.Internal.IConsoleService.DumpPrintDebugRecall(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Dumps the accumulated debug console if the feature was enabled.

member.name: M:Prime.ConsoleService.Internal.IConsoleService.ClearPrintDebugRecall(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Clears the accumulated debug console if the feature was enabled.

member.name: M:Prime.ConsoleService.PrintDebugRecallContextProvider.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
